An evening of art, fashion & culture

The Conservatory at One Sansome  ·  San Francisco  ·  June 13, 2026

Secure Your Place
01

The Concept

"What if SF had its own Met Gala?"

The SF Met Gala is a private, friends-organized party built around the one thing SF has never really had: a proper excuse to get dressed up. No charity auction, no corporate sponsor. Just a really good night in a beautiful building with people who take fashion seriously.

The theme is Costume Art — same as this year's real Met Gala. Sculptural silhouettes, draped fabric, architectural shapes. Outfits that belong in a gallery. We're not throwing this in a museum, so we're turning the venue into one.

"Wear something that belongs in a gallery."
02

The Theme

"Costume Art"

  • Classical drapery & Grecian form
  • Avant-garde fashion — Comme des Garçons, Schiaparelli, Iris van Herpen
  • Body as sculpture

Suggested palette

Marble
Crimson
Onyx
Gold
Bronze
Stone
Comme des Garçons· Schiaparelli· Iris van Herpen· Alexander McQueen· Valentino· Balenciaga· John Galliano· Rick Owens· Comme des Garçons· Schiaparelli· Iris van Herpen· Alexander McQueen· Valentino· Balenciaga· John Galliano· Rick Owens·
03

The Venue

The Conservatory at One Sansome

A four-story glass-ceilinged atrium in the Financial District. The building is 113 years old, restored in 2023 — 38-foot Doric columns, a glass ceiling you can look straight up through, 8,100 square feet of open floor. Almost nobody knows it exists. It's where the city's real galas happen.

The Conservatory at One Sansome

Financial District, San Francisco · Est. 1912, Restored 2023

04

The Evening

What to expect.

Red Carpet

Photographers, a backdrop, and your main character moment. From 7 PM.

Open Bar

Open bar, all night. Cocktails, mocktails, beer, wine & sodas.

Bites

Hors d'oeuvres & small plates throughout the evening. Not a sit-down dinner.

Dance Floor

DJ spinning artsy, eclectic sets. The atrium is the floor.

Fashion Competition

Best on-theme, best outfit, fanciest look — with a charismatic MC.

Photos from our past event, the SF Adult Prom at the Exploratorium
